# AT+CIMI responses — IMSI (International Mobile Subscriber Identity)
# Format: <imsi>  (15 digits)

# Standard 15-digit IMSI
262010123456789
OK

# Another valid IMSI (different MCC/MNC)
310260987654321
OK

# SIM not inserted
+CME ERROR: 10

# SIM not ready (still initialising)
+CME ERROR: 14

# PIN required
+CME ERROR: 11
